notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ Bridge for CentOS 7.9. It addresses 12 CVEs: CVE-2022-3640, CVE-2022-50367, CVE-2022-50386, CVE-2022-50403, CVE-2022-50408, and 7 more.
